stonetop.summary: A six-foot armored mustelid, forever digging up the Flats for food.

system.concept: A six-foot armored mustelid, forever digging up the Flats for food.
system.description: Great big armored mustelids, like a cross between a stoat, a badger, and a pangolin, but six feet long not counting the tail. They roam the Flats digging up burrows of just about anything, but they especially love to stir up a hlomren nest and chomp chomp chomp. Far from the top of the food chain: if startled they spray musk and flee; if cornered they curl up and hope the attacker grows bored. A skilled tanner can turn a pair of hides into a magnificent beznpol scale coat (2 armor, warm, protects against acid, Value 3).
